steps.title: Count tall birch and maple trees
steps.content:
Birch: $$4 \times 9 = 36$$ tall birch trees.
Maple: $$7 \times 6 = 42$$ tall maple trees.

steps.title: Compute conditional probability
steps.content:
Total tall trees: $$36 + 42 = 78$$.
Probability maple given tall: $$\frac{42}{78} = \frac{7}{13}$$ after dividing numerator and denominator by $6$.
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
